topic: Perplexity AI search methodology, answer synthesis patterns

entries.a: Vane is a privacy-focused AI answering engine that runs entirely on your own hardware.

entries.q: What are the key features of Vane?
entries.a: Vane features include support for local LLMs and cloud providers, smart search modes, cited sources, and a private search experience.
Vane ensures privacy by running entirely on your own hardware and using private search engines like SearxNG.

entries.q: What search modes are available in Vane?
entries.a: Vane offers three search modes: Speed Mode, Balanced Mode, and Quality Mode.
Yes, Vane allows you to limit your search to specific websites or domains.
Vane can be installed using Docker or by building from source, with Docker being the recommended method.

entries.q: What is SearxNG and how is it related to Vane?
entries.a: SearxNG is a private search engine that Vane uses to power its web search functionality.

entries.q: Can I use Vane with my own SearxNG instance?
entries.a: Yes, you can use Vane with your own SearxNG instance by configuring the SEARXNG_API_URL environment variable.
